overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city during a heavy rainstorm. The player walks along covered walkways and open plazas beneath elevated highways, passing pedestrians with high-tech glowing umbrellas and futuristic vehicles on adjacent roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following an NPC ahead while vehicles pass on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego along the covered walkway

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' with a portrait
concrete overhang with embedded lighting providing shelter from rain
red and white striped barriers separating pedestrian walkway from road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered concrete sidewalk adjacent to a busy futuristic road. A massive digital billboard reading 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' dominates the left wall while traffic barriers line the right. The walkway is sheltered from the heavy rain visible beyond the barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza stairs beneath elevated highway

events.description: turns right and exits covered walkway ascending stairs into open plaza
emerging from artificial lighting into natural overcast light with heavy rain becoming visible

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up concrete stairs into the open plaza area while following an NPC with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: ascending stairs ahead holding a purple glowing futuristic umbrella

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up from covered walkway to elevated plaza
massive concrete and metal highway overpass with orange accent lighting
tall vertical digital sign displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the sheltered walkway, the camera turns right and ascends concrete stairs into an open plaza exposed to heavy rain. An NPC with a purple glowing umbrella leads the way up. The massive elevated highway structure looms overhead against the grey stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital advertising pillars beneath elevated highway

events.description: reaches top of stairs and continues walking forward on flat plaza surface
passing by seated NPCs on benches and digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked plaza following NPCs with futuristic glowing umbrellas while passing other pedestrians seated on benches

notable_agents.action: walking with green glowing umbrella and camouflage pants

segments.scene_description: Walking across the open plaza beneath the elevated highway, surrounded by heavy rain. The camera follows NPCs carrying futuristic glowing umbrellas in purple and green. Digital advertising pillars display animated content while other NPCs sit on benches nearby, and modern glass buildings rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass adjacent to road

events.description: enters covered underpass area leaving the open plaza
moving from natural rain light to dimmer artificial underpass lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass following an NPC with a black umbrella while vehicles pass on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with black umbrella entering the underpass

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the building underpass providing shelter from rain
massive concrete building structure forming the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered underpass beneath a large building, leaving the heavy rain behind. The lighting shifts to artificial as the camera follows an NPC with a black umbrella. Futuristic vehicles continue to pass on the road visible to the left through the open side of the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor through a rain-drenched plaza and into a dim artificial underpass. It begins along a covered concrete sidewalk dominated by a massive security billboard, moving parallel to a busy futuristic road. As the camera turns right and ascends a set of stairs, the shelter vanishes and the scene opens into an exposed plaza where heavy rain falls beneath the looming shadow of an elevated highway. The movement continues across the open square, passing NPCs with glowing purple and green umbrellas and animated advertising pillars, before turning toward the entrance of a large building. Finally, the camera enters a covered underpass, shifting the lighting from the grey stormy sky to artificial tones as the rain is left behind.
